test case id: tc-system-007 title: user generates a report with concurrent requests module: system source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9 preconditions: multiple users are logged into the system simultaneously. test data: multiple users generate reports concurrently. test steps: 1. multiple users log into the system simultaneously. 2. each user selects a report generation option. 3. each user inputs valid report parameters. 4. reportmanager processes the requests concurrently. 5. datamanager fetches the required data for each user. 6. webserver displays the generated reports for each user. expected result: the system handles concurrent requests without issues, generating and displaying reports for each user.
